description: An accountant needs to consolidate the financial statements of a parent company and its three subsidiaries.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the individual financial statements for the parent company and all subsidiaries.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully gathers all four sets of financial statements.

nodes.task_description: Identify and process all intercompany transactions that need to be eliminated.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies and lists all intercompany loans and sales.

nodes.task_description: Generate the consolidated balance sheet and income statement.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces the final consolidated financial reports.
